description: Style Note Candy coloured wallets from bulchee for the spring! The staid and conservative brand pops out some brights this season that we so love. Drop one in your hold-all or simple carry it around like a mini-clutch, this piece is designed to look great either way. Product Details Strawberry red wallet with perforations all over for style Has two zipped main compartments One compartment has two slip pockets and one separator Other compartment has a zipped separator, 12 card slots and two pockets Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Size Length: 10 cm Width: 19 cm
